videos.title: Shymbulak Alpine Race 2015
videos.description: О чем это видео:Shymbulak Alpine Race 2015

videos.title: Wow! Largest ski race in the world attracts over 1.5 million skiers
videos.description: The Russian Ski Run maybe is the world's largest ski race in terms of the number of participants. It is said that over 1.5 million skiers across Russia have applied to take part in the mass skiing event this year, which was held in 74 regions in the country on Feb. 11.The race has been held annually since 1982. It includes a five-kilometer and ten-kilometer courses.
